== Notes for [[Item:Q113415|Q113415]] ==

Lupo I, comte de Bigorre1

b. circa 815, d. after 910

Father Donat Lupo, comte de Bigorre2 b. circa 795, d. 820

Mother Facquilène de Bigorre1 b. circa 795

Lupo I, comte de Bigorre was born circa 815. He was the son of Donat Lupo, comte de Bigorre and Facquilène de Bigorre.2,1 Lupo I, comte de Bigorre married N. N. de Toulouse, daughter of Raymond I, comte de Toulouse and Bertha de Reims.1,3 Count of Bigorre at Aquitaine, France, between 870 and 910. Lupo I, comte de Bigorre died after 910.1

Family

N. N. de Toulouse b. circa 840

Children

Ramón I, conde Ribagorza y Pallars+ b. c 855?, d. c 9164

Dadailidis de Bigorre+ b. c 860?

Dato II, comte de Bigorre+ b. c 8995

Name Prefix:<NPFX> Count Name Suffix:<NSFX> I, Of Bigorre

#Générale##Générale#2ème fils.
Profession : Comte de Bigorre.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
